body.title: Add stable typed finding codes to audit tool outputs
body.result: AR-001..AR-007 codes in audit_runner.py; code field in audit_checks.json; --code flag in audit_add.py; skill-file codes are separate work
body.description:
audit-design, audit-ticket, and day-close-audit emit prose AMEND/FAIL text. Downstream agents (consequence-check tickets, audit-audits) must parse free-form text to match patterns. Stable finding codes (e.g. AD-C01 through AD-C10 for audit-design checks, AT-D01 for audit-ticket) alongside prose enable machine-composable pipelines where agents match findings by code rather than parsing language.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/audit_design.py (or equivalent), wild_igor/igor/tools/audit_ticket.py, lab/claudecode/audit_runner.py
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding (OOP-first), theigors/rules/docs-live-in-code
**Scope boundary:** In scope: add stable code field to all finding objects emitted by the three audits; maintain backward-compatible prose output alongside codes. Out of scope: changing how codes are consumed (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** Run audit-design on a test decision; verify output contains {code: 'AD-C10', severity: '...', ...} alongside existing AMEND text. Verify same code emitted on two runs of same input.
